title: datumctl
description: Authenticate and manage resources using a K8s-style syntax (get, apply, delete).

title: Domains
description: Organize and programmatically manage domain resources across providers.

title: Secrets
description: Organize and protect sensitive data in a central location.

title: Metrics Export
description: Export full OTel metrics to Grafana Cloud along with prebuilt dashboards.

title: Fine Grained Permissions
description: Manage groups and fine-grained IAM role assignments.

title: Machine Accounts
description: Assign identity credentials to agents or applications and let the machines do the rest.

title: Audit & Activity Logs
description: Production grade infrastructure with built in features for activity / audit logging.

title: Datum MCP
description: An official, self-hosted MCP server that is tightly integrated with Cursor.

title: Developer Tools
description: macOS, Windows, and Linux apps for exposing localhost to the internet.

title: AI assistant
description: Ask datumctl about your Datum Cloud resources in natural language, from a one-shot question or an interactive session.

title: + more
description: We'll continue to add more and more features as we grow.
